name: Accessibility Test Environment
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y webkit2gtk-4.0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 at-spi2-core orca python3-gi python3-dbus python3-pip dbus-x11 gsettings-desktop-schemas xvfb x11vnc fluxbox
postStartCommand: pip3 install pyatspi2 dbus-python && unset DISPLAY && Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1024x768x24 & export DISPLAY=:99 && fluxbox & sleep 2 && mkdir -p ~/.vnc && echo 'test123' | vncpasswd -f > ~/.vnc/passwd && chmod 600 ~/.vnc/passwd && x11vnc -display :99 -forever -passwd test123 -rfbport 5900 -bg && echo 'Accessibility test environment with VNC ready!'
